subcodes.first_line: ...Thou hast written regarding the results of my trip to America. Its importance is not now manifest. Erelong you shall behold that these pure seeds have grown
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @growth of the Cause, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
